General.Name: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. Common stock
General.Description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc., an energy company, engages in finding and exploiting energy projects in oil and gas in the United States. It develops its Caney Shale oil acreage in the Tishomingo field in the Ardmore Basin, Oklahoma, which produces oil, gas, and natural gas liquids. The company was formerly known as BNK Petroleum Inc. and changed its name to Kolibri Global Energy Inc. in November 2020. Kolibri Global Energy Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California.
General.Address: 925 Broadbeck Drive, Thousand Oaks, CA, United States, 91320
